name: Yeovil Athletics Track (Bill Whistlecroft Athletics Arena)
metaTitle: Yeovil Athletics Track - Bill Whistlecroft Athletics Arena | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for the Bill Whistlecroft Athletics Arena in Yeovil.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: The arena is open daily from 06:00. Home to Yeovil Olympiads AC; check the Recreation Centre site for event closures.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Casual users can access the track by purchasing an annual track pass from the Yeovil Recreation Centre office.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A dedicated 400m athletics arena with a synthetic track and complete field event areas for all disciplines.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site parking is available via Pickett Lane or the main Chilton Grove entrance.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Yeovil Recreation Centre website for annual pass applications and facility details.
